evals.prompt: Build a point set from skills/point-set-management/evals/samples.csv with columns Easting/Northing/RL for coordinates, auto-detect attributes, and summarize it.
evals.expected_output: Point set is created with a summary reporting point_count=10 and attribute names including GRADE and LITHOLOGY.

evals.prompt: Build a point set from skills/point-set-management/evals/samples_with_invalid.csv using Easting/Northing/RL for coordinates, drop any rows with bad coordinates, then summarize it and report how many rows were dropped.
evals.expected_output: Summary shows fewer than 7 rows due to dropped invalid coordinate rows. dropped_invalid_coordinate_rows is greater than 0.

evals.prompt: Build a point set from skills/point-set-management/evals/samples.csv using Easting/Northing/RL for coordinates, then get the attribute details to identify numeric versus non-numeric attributes and null counts.
evals.expected_output: Attribute details return per-attribute dtype, is_numeric, null_count, and preview_values. GRADE is numeric, LITHOLOGY is non-numeric.
